div.p: Alignment Notes: • Struct aligned to 8-byte boundary (largest member) • int fields padded to maintain alignment • Cache line size: 64 bytes (typical x86-64)

ul.li: chunk + ip + padding = 16 bytes (¼ cache line)

div.p: sizeof(Chunk*) = 8 bytes sizeof(int ip) = 4 bytes padding = 4 bytes sizeof(stack[256]) = 2,048 bytes sizeof(stack_top) = 4 bytes padding = 4 bytes ───────────────────────────── TOTAL = 2,072 bytes
